# PleasureZone Uganda
> Premium intimate wellness e-commerce platform serving Uganda with discreet delivery

## About
PleasureZone Uganda is the leading online store for intimate wellness products in Uganda. We offer premium vibrators, lingerie, lubricants, couples toys, and wellness accessories with same-day delivery in Kampala and nationwide shipping. All orders ship in plain, discreet packaging with anonymous billing.

## Key Features
- Discreet packaging and plain shipping labels
- Same-day delivery in Kampala
- Nationwide delivery across Uganda
- Secure checkout with multiple payment methods (Mobile Money, Card, PayPal, Cash on Delivery)
- Loyalty rewards program
- Subscription boxes
- Gift cards and gift sending
- Seller marketplace

## Main Pages
- /: Homepage with featured products, new arrivals, bestsellers, flash sales
- /category: Browse all product categories
- /category?cat=toys: Toys & Vibrators
- /category?cat=lingerie: Lingerie collection
- /category?cat=wellness: Wellness products
- /category?cat=lubricants: Lubricants & personal care
- /category?cat=couples: Couples products
- /sales: Current sales and deals
- /product/[slug]: Individual product pages with reviews, ratings, and related products
- /blog: Wellness guides, tips, and product reviews
- /blog/[slug]: Individual blog articles
- /search: Product search with filters
- /gift-cards: Gift card purchase
- /subscription-boxes: Curated monthly subscription boxes
- /beginners: Beginner's guide to intimate wellness
- /couples: Products curated for couples
- /contact: Contact information and support
- /faq: Frequently asked questions
- /store: Browse seller storefronts
- /seller/[slug]: Individual seller pages
- /track-order: Order tracking

## Product Categories
- Vibrators & Toys
- Lingerie & Apparel
- Lubricants & Personal Care
- Couples Toys & Intimacy Products
- Sexual Wellness & Self-Care
- Intimate Accessories

## Business Information
- Name: PleasureZone Uganda
- Location: Kampala, Uganda
- Delivery: Same-day in Kampala, 1-3 days nationwide
- Payment: Mobile Money (MTN, Airtel), Visa/Mastercard, PayPal, Cash on Delivery
- Currency: UGX (Ugandan Shilling)

## Policies
- /policies/privacy: Privacy policy
- /policies/terms: Terms of service
- /policies/shipping: Shipping policy

- Support: /support (live chat available)
